report.market_summary: 2026-05-29 盘前的主线是 Dell 在 2026-05-28 盘后继续强化 AI 服务器与数据中心基建的业绩兑现，而 2026-05-28 的 PCE 与 GDP 组合没有比预期更热，叠加美伊停火延长期待压低油价，短线有利于风险偏好；但美联储官员口径仍偏鹰，意味着高估值扩张仍受约束。
report.main_theme: …2026-05-29 盘前主线：AI 基建继续兑现，但利率与地缘变量仍在。
report.markdown_summary:
# Daily US Market Intelligence Report
日期：2026-05-29
覆盖范围：2026-05-29 至 2026-06-05
美股状态：盘前

详见 Markdown 正文：2026-05/2026-05-29-Daily-US-Market-Intelligence-Report.md

topSignals.title: Dell raised AI server expectations after 2026-05-28 results
topSignals.summary: Dell reported fiscal 2027 first-quarter revenue of $43.8 billion, said AI server revenue reached $16.1 billion, and lifted its fiscal-year AI server revenue expectation to about $60 billion.
topSignals.why_it_matters: This is evidence that AI demand is converting into revenue beyond upstream GPU suppliers and is spreading through servers, networking, and data center infrastructure.

source_urls.title: Reuters: Dell raises annual forecasts as AI data center buildout fuels demand

topSignals.title: 2026-05-28 PCE and GDP were not hotter than expected, but not dovish either
topSignals.summary: BEA reported April 2026 PCE inflation at 3.8% year over year and core PCE at 3.3% year over year and 0.2% month over month, while first-quarter GDP second estimate was revised down to 1.6%.
topSignals.why_it_matters: The macro mix is better than a renewed inflation scare, but still not weak enough to force a clear dovish turn from the Fed. That helps quality growth but does not fully support speculative multiple expansion.

source_urls.title: BEA: Personal Income and Outlays, April 2026
BEA: GDP Second Estimate and Corporate Profits, 1st Quarter 2026
Reuters: Inflation rises but isn't hotter than expected while GDP slips

topSignals.title: US-Iran ceasefire extension headlines pressured oil lower, but the deal is not fully settled
topSignals.summary: AP and Reuters reported a 60-day ceasefire extension framework and progress in nuclear talks, which reduced near-term expectations for a prolonged Hormuz disruption and weighed on oil prices.
topSignals.why_it_matters: Lower oil can ease inflation pressure and support risk assets, but the market impact could reverse quickly if the framework breaks down or if approvals fail.

source_urls.title: AP: Wall Street pushes to more records as profits keep piling up
AP: Iran negotiators agree to extend ceasefire
Reuters: Oil falls slightly on reports of potential US-Iran ceasefire deal

topSignals.title: Samsung began shipping HBM4E samples on 2026-05-29
topSignals.summary: Samsung announced initial shipments of 12-layer HBM4E samples to global customers and described it as the first such product shipment in the industry.
topSignals.why_it_matters: HBM remains a critical bottleneck in AI training and inference. Sample shipment is not the same as mass production, but it reinforces attention on memory, packaging, and bandwidth supply chains.

topSignals.title: Fed speakers remained hawkish across 2026-05-27 to 2026-05-28
topSignals.summary: Cook said she was prepared to raise rates if inflation does not ease, Jefferson said he remained focused on inflation, and Williams said policy is in the right place given the outlook.
topSignals.why_it_matters: Even after a softer-than-feared core PCE print, the Fed is not signaling an easy policy pivot. That keeps pressure on high-valuation software and duration-sensitive growth names.

source_urls.title: Reuters: Cook prepared to raise rates
Reuters: Williams says policy is in the right place

events.watch_points: Watch new orders, prices paid, and employment components for signs of better activity without renewed inflation heat.
Watch whether data center, grid, and industrial construction spending remains firm.
Watch AI systems backlog, Juniper integration, and enterprise networking demand.
Watch whether labor demand keeps cooling enough to offset inflation worries.
Watch paid AI coding adoption, seat expansion, and guidance quality.
Watch new orders, inventories, and unfilled orders for confirmation of physical-economy demand.
Watch prices paid and employment for evidence that services inflation is cooling or reaccelerating.
Watch qualitative changes in labor, wages, prices, consumer spending, and credit conditions.
Watch whether cyber security can reassert growth quality after Zscaler's post-earnings drop.
Watch AI revenue, networking mix, customer concentration, and guidance into the next quarter.
Watch unit labor costs for renewed inflation pressure.
Watch whether labor-market cooling is continuing into the payroll report.
Watch whether AI-native identity and agreement tools improve ARR and margins.
Watch payrolls, unemployment rate, and average hourly earnings for the next move in rate expectations.

sectors.sector_name: AI Infrastructure / Servers / Data Center Power
latest_catalysts: Dell raised its fiscal 2027 AI server revenue expectation to about $60 billion after 2026-05-28 results.
HPE on 2026-06-01 and Broadcom on 2026-06-03 are the next checkpoints for whether AI demand is broadening into systems, networking, and supporting infrastructure.
pressured_tickers: Speculative second-line AI hardware names without margin or delivery proof

latest_catalysts: Samsung began shipping HBM4E samples on 2026-05-29.
Marvell continued to emphasize custom AI silicon, networking, and optics demand after 2026-05-27 results.
pressured_tickers: Small-cap HBM and packaging theme names without proven production ramps

latest_catalysts: Marvell extended the AI expansion logic from GPUs into custom XPU, switching silicon, and optical interconnect.
Broadcom's 2026-06-03 earnings are the next major validation point for AI networking and ASIC revenue concentration.
pressured_tickers: High-beta optical and switching names if Broadcom guidance does not exceed expectations

source_urls.title: Marvell NVLink Fusion / Custom AI XPU

latest_catalysts: Snowflake lifted full-year product revenue guidance after 2026-05-27 results.
Salesforce beat on results but its quarterly revenue outlook missed expectations, while CrowdStrike and DocuSign will test whether enterprise AI software demand can convert into durable guidance.

source_urls.title: Reuters: Salesforce sees quarterly revenue below estimates

macro.treasury_yields: 2026-05-29 盘前需继续观察 10Y 美债收益率是否因 2026-05-28 的 PCE/GDP 组合而维持在不压制成长股的区间。
macro.dollar_index: Reuters 报道称 2026-05-29 亚洲时段美元有望周线走弱，缓解了科技估值压力，但这仍需要后续宏观数据确认。
macro.crude_oil: Oil softened on ceasefire-extension headlines, which is near-term positive for inflation expectations but remains contingent on whether the diplomatic framework holds.
macro.gold: 黄金不是本日报告的主变量，但若地缘或利率预期反复，仍可作为风险对冲观察项。
macro.vix: Risk appetite stayed constructive into 2026-05-29 premarket, but VIX direction should still be checked against rates and payroll-related expectations.
macro.macro_data: The main macro mix is slowing growth without a fresh inflation shock. That is supportive for large-cap AI and quality growth in the short run, but not enough to remove the Fed from the equation.
macro.growth_tech_smallcap_impact: 对大型 AI 与现金流较强的科技龙头偏中性略利好；对纯题材型小盘成长股仍是“不够宽松”的环境。

decliners.volume_note: Micro-cap move with limited explanatory disclosure identified in public sources reviewed for 2026-05-28.
decliners.reason: No reliable same-day company filing or press release was found during this run. The move appears more likely related to liquidity, trading pressure, or micro-cap structure than to a clearly verified fundamental catalyst.
decliners.watch_points: Watch for any 8-K, financing, delisting, or operating update that can explain the move.

decliners.volume_note: Another small-cap move with limited reliable same-day catalyst disclosure.
decliners.reason: No sufficiently reliable first-hand filing or company announcement was found during this run to explain the one-day decline. Current judgment remains uncertain and likely trading-driven.
decliners.watch_points: Watch for capital raise, compliance, or operations-related filings.

decliners.volume_note: Larger and more fundamentally relevant decline than the micro-cap movers above.
decliners.reason: Photronics reported fiscal second-quarter 2026 results on 2026-05-28, and the market reaction pointed to weaker revenue, earnings, and/or outlook expectations versus what investors had priced in.
decliners.watch_points: Watch next-quarter orders, integrated circuit demand recovery, and management commentary on customer spending.

source_urls.title: Photronics fiscal Q2 2026 results release PDF
Why Photronics Stock Is Plummeting Today

decliners.volume_note: Low-priced micro-cap under continuing listing and financing stress.
decliners.reason: Aditxt disclosed Nasdaq delisting determination risk on 2026-05-06 and reverse split-related filings on 2026-05-14. The 2026-05-28 decline looks consistent with an ongoing repricing of listing and capital-market risk.
decliners.watch_points: Watch appeal status, listing venue outcome, and further capital raises.

watchlist.reason_to_watch: Dell delivered one of the clearest new proof points that AI server demand is converting into real revenue and guidance.
watchlist.key_trigger: Watch whether 2026-05-29 price action holds after the post-earnings gap and whether analysts keep revising full-year expectations higher.
watchlist.risk_points: If the opening move is overextended or margin details disappoint, the market could treat the print as a sell-the-news event.

watchlist.reason_to_watch: Broadcom earnings on 2026-06-03 are the next major validation point for the AI networking and custom silicon trade after Marvell and Dell.
watchlist.key_trigger: Watch whether expectations keep building into the report and whether optical and switching names continue to move in sympathy.
watchlist.risk_points: If Broadcom guidance merely meets expectations, the highest-beta networking and optical names could retrace quickly.

watchlist.reason_to_watch: Dell already strengthened the downstream AI infrastructure story, so HPE and data center support-chain names become the next check for breadth and delivery quality.
watchlist.key_trigger: Watch HPE results on 2026-06-01, especially AI systems backlog, delivery timing, and commentary on enterprise and networking demand.
watchlist.risk_points: Strong orders with weak margins would revive doubts about how much value downstream OEMs and infrastructure suppliers actually retain.

watchlist.reason_to_watch: Snowflake has already shown a positive enterprise AI monetization response, but the software group remains selective rather than broadly risk-on.
watchlist.key_trigger: Watch whether Snowflake can hold leadership while rates remain firm and whether peers begin to trade on conversion metrics rather than only product stories.
watchlist.risk_points: If yields rise again, high-multiple software could underperform even with good company-specific AI narratives.

watchlist.reason_to_watch: Zscaler's sharp reaction raised the standard for security software guidance, making CrowdStrike a critical group-level read on 2026-06-03.
watchlist.key_trigger: Watch net new ARR, margins, and full-year guidance quality in relation to current expectations.
watchlist.risk_points: If guidance is only in line, the market may extend the post-ZS de-rating across software security names.

watchlist.reason_to_watch: The 2026-06-01 to 2026-06-05 macro sequence remains the main cross-asset governor for how far AI and growth valuations can extend.
watchlist.key_trigger: Watch ISM on 2026-06-01 and 2026-06-03, JOLTS on 2026-06-02, weekly claims on 2026-06-04, and payrolls on 2026-06-05.
watchlist.risk_points: Any renewed wage or inflation pressure could reverse the current support from the softer-than-feared 2026-05-28 PCE print.
